expo.name: Kezi
expo.description: Your trusted companion for cycle tracking, maternal health, and wellness. Track your menstrual cycle with precision, access personalized AI health insights, shop cycle-synced wellness products, and connect with nearby pharmacies - all in one beautifully designed app built for women in Rwanda and beyond.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Kezi uses your location to find nearby pharmacies and wellness stores in your area.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Kezi uses your location to find nearby pharmacies and wellness stores in your area.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Kezi uses your camera to upload photos for your profile and product reviews.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Kezi uses your photo library to select profile pictures and product images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Kezi saves exported cycle data and receipts to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Kezi uses Face ID for secure and convenient sign-in to protect your health data.
infoPlist.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: Kezi uses this data only to improve your experience and never sells your information.
